mano_cua.result_summary: mano-cua 18步自然结束。大部分步骤在处理 macOS 权限弹窗（照片/桌面/文档/下载文件夹访问）和在 Terminal 中执行 find 命令查找源码。未实际测试 loading bar 异步拦截器行为。页面本身为纯演示站，无异步拦截器配置入口。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The find command is taking a long time. Tried to find Angular project source to configure async interceptor, but task ended before any meaningful testing.

deploy_notes: commit 6ecb090e43 (v1.3.0). node-sass shim applied. Dev server on port 4501.
